title: heptapleurum divaricatum
intro: Heptapleurum divaricatum, also known as the umbrella tree or umbrella fern, is a type of flowering plant native to tropical Asia. It is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, making it effective in treating various health issues. The plant's extracts have been traditionally used to treat fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions, providing relief from pain and inflammation. Heptapleurum divaricatum can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, and its leaves can be used in poultices or applied topically to the affected area.
